claim_text: Wheat developmental stages from heading to anthesis (BBCH 50-69) are especially sensitive to drought stress.

value.raw_value_text: The developmental stages from heading until anthesis are especially sensitive to drought stress González-Navarro et al. (2015). If drought stress is too severe, shedding of fertilised ﬂorets can occur after anthesis.
value.text_value: Wheat developmental stages from heading to anthesis (BBCH 50-69) are especially sensitive to drought stress.

provenance.evidence_text: The developmental stages from heading until anthesis are especially sensitive to drought stress González-Navarro et al. (2015). If drought stress is too severe, shedding of fertilised ﬂorets can occur after anthesis.
